def negative_string_mode_parameter_replaces_enum_or_literal_contract():
    rule_id = "string_mode_parameter_replaces_enum_or_literal_contract"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag string mode parameters that should be constrained by an enum or literal contract."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
